'''Ruhe''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was allied with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] maintained a citadel on Ruhe, situated on the edge of a massive [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] or meteoric crater. Half a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Clone Wars)|Battle of Boz Pity]], a strike team including [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Jenks (clone trooper)|Jenks]] was shot down on Ruhe while trying to capture Dooku; it was later revealed that it was a trap set by Dooku in the hopes of capturing Skywalker and Kenobi.
